caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a white banner displays the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically, accompanied by gold stars. Behind him, a blue screen displays the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him sits a black mug with "BOSS TALK" text and a logo. The man is seen speaking and gesturing; while he remains relatively still in the first few frames, he eventually raises his right hand to point forward, showcasing a gold watch on his wrist. The scene remains static in terms of lighting and setting, capturing a focused shot of the man during a recording or broadcast.
